programs.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programs.desc: Adam eats cheddar in Cheddar before traveling to a farm café for roast chicken and a cheesy celeriac and leek bake, stopping at a vending machine for chocolate milk and tucking into a quiche from a mother-daughter bakery.

programs.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programs.desc: Adam travels to Melton Mowbray for a famous pork pie, some traditional sweets, a chicken curry at an award-winning restaurant and a mac and cheese doughnut from a village eatery.

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: Noah travels to Edmonton for s'mores mini donuts at K-Days; drops by the North Dakota State Fair and samples wild rice burgers.

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: At the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta, Noah samples a Korean twist on a French dip, a Diablo Dog, and the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack; the Henderson, Nev., St. Patrick's Day Festival has Blasted Irish Burgers and gold-infused Leprechaun Mac.

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Washington County Fair in Utah for the Twisted Pickle Roll -- a deep-fried pickle sushi dream come true -- and has a little dessert in the desert with the Cookie Dough Dog. Then, he's off to the Clark County Fair in Nevada for Pretzel French Toast and the spicy Cheesy Carne Brick. Finally, Noah heads to the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee for their Southern Fried Softshell Sandwich, the Fiery Fiesta Funnel Cake and Grape Gems, a candy-coated fruity treat!

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: The OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake; a Wurstburger and a chocolaty Black Forest Float at the Oktoberfest celebration known as Wurstfest.
